goals.text: Full bilateral upper body session — both arms loading equally
goals.notes: Long-term benchmark. Dependent on orthopedic clearance for right shoulder — currently under monitoring.

goals.text: Left-side DB press 40 lbs for 3 sets of 8 reps
goals.notes: Left side cleared for pushing by surgeon in December. Progressing well — right-side strength provides a ceiling target.
Lower body is his strong suit — channeling tennis player athleticism into leg press milestones.
